allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: ARHA 감성 벡터 대화 시스템 MVP

- Claude API 기반 텍스트 채팅 \(스트리밍\)
- 감정 벡터 분석 대시보드 \(Ψ/Φ/공명도\)
- Vercel Serverless Function 배포 지원
- 대화 히스토리 로컬 저장
- 날씨 연동 배경 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Vercel 배포 호환 - direct fetch API 방식으로 전환

- Serverless Function에서 SDK 대신 fetch로 Anthropic API 호출
- claudeService에서 JSON/SSE 자동 감지 \(배포/로컬 호환\)
- vercel.json, .gitignore 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd /c "cd /d ""C:\\Users\\garsi\\OneDrive\\바탕 화면\\arha---감성-벡터-대화-시스템"" && start npm run dev")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
$lines = Get-Content ''C:\\Users\\garsi\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-garsi-OneDrive-------arha---------------\\bac0f01b-a385-4f41-a355-da3de37f7f97.jsonl''
$line2599 = $lines[2598]
$line2599 | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty message | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20
")

Bash(# Read the jsonl transcript to understand what was being worked on cat ""/c/Users/garsi/.claude/projects/C--Users-garsi-OneDrive-------arha---------------/bac0f01b-a385-4f41-a355-da3de37f7f97.jsonl"" | tail -60 | python3 -c "" import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) role = obj.get\(''role'', obj.get\(''type'', ''''\)\) content = obj.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[{role}]: {c[\\""text\\""][:800]}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content: print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:800]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass "")

Bash(git rm src/engines/C-001_ARHAEmotionEngine.ts src/engines/C-002_ARHAAnalyticsEngine.ts src/engines/C-003_ARHAAgentEngine.ts src/engines/C-003_ARHAAgentEngine_V4.ts src/containers/C-004_CommandContainer.ts src/containers/C-005_OrchestrationContainer.ts src/containers/C-006_StatusContainer.ts src/containers/C-007_APIGatewayContainer.ts src/containers/C-008_VibeComplianceContainer.ts src/containers/C-008_VibeComplianceContainer_V2.ts src/containers/C-008_VibeComplianceContainer_V2_OLD.ts)
